---
description: Standards for user-facing documentation in docs/user/
globs: docs/user/**/*.md
---

# User Documentation Standards

These rules apply to all documentation under `docs/user/`. The audience is first-time users, developers evaluating the project, and testers.

## Voice and structure

- Lead with outcome, not feature ("In 5 minutes, you'll have X running")
- Quick start in 3–5 copy-pasteable steps to a visible win
- Progressive complexity: quickstart → concepts → reference → advanced
- Troubleshoot by symptom (what you see → why → fix → prevent)
- Define jargon inline on first use
- Contextual "What's next?" at end of every section
- Realistic examples, not placeholders
- "You" voice, imperative throughout
